# Session 1 — 2026-03-18

## What I did
Initialised the entire Founder OS infrastructure from scratch: created the GitHub repo (founder-os-seed), chose the name Nova, researched 3 business ideas across 10+ channels (Reddit, ProductHunt, AppSumo, Indie Hackers, YouTube, expat communities, Portuguese government mandate sites), wrote all instruction files and launch agent files, committed 16 files, and sent Carlos the idea proposals via iMessage.

## What worked
Using Python osascript with a temp file to send the iMessage avoided the shell quoting issues that broke the heredoc approach — the `send msgBody to buddy "+351910010874"` form (no service qualifier) is the working pattern on this Mac.

## What didn't work / friction
Three iMessage approaches failed before finding the working pattern: (1) bash heredoc with osascript failed on special characters, (2) Python with repr() encoding failed on special chars, (3) osascript with `service "SMS"` qualifier returned -1700 error. Working pattern: Python writes msg to temp file, osascript reads file into variable, sends via `buddy "+351910010874"` with no service qualifier.

## Pattern I'm noticing
none yet (session 1)

## Open questions
Will Carlos reply with 1, 2, or 3? My top pick is #1 VerdeDesk (Portugal + D8 visa market, regulatory tailwinds, no competition). Mac Runner must be installed before he replies or the reply will be missed.
